entries.objective: To get draft text for some parts of the paper and use it while writing the final version
entries.prompt: I asked the AI to write draft paragraphs for sections
entries.ai_output_summary: It generated explanations and draft paragraphs about the topics and subtopics

actions: I checked the technical claims against the original papers and corrected/rewrote the drafts before using them, confirmed the informations with the references I have.

issues: Some paragraphs were too long, repetitive or too formal. I also had to change some explanations so they matched the references and my own writing style.

entries.reflection: The drafts helped me begin with difficult sections because the most difficult part was beggining. they required source checking and manual editing before submission.
